text:
is a fictional character from the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. She is a member of the WILLE organization.

Profile

Sumire is a dark-skinned woman with long hair kept in a ponytail. She is in charge of the anti-gravity system of the Wunder. She seems to have a serious personality, She does not worry about others, focusing mostly on her.

History

EVANGELION 3.0: (-46h)

Sumire is seen being the first one to finish 30 pull up bar alongside Midori Kitakami and Hideki Tama as they lag behind her, still being at 20. She leaves them early as they finish it.

Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo

Like almost everyone in WILLE, Sumire Nagara's past in unknown. She appears for the first time when Shinji Ikari is driven on the deck of AAA Wunder. She only glances at the boy, without further attention. On the deck, she is the most prominent member of the bow. It is also the only one to not have a seat, but to be on a kind of high stool. When Captain Misato Katsuragi orders the takeoff of the ship, Sumire does not object because of mechanical risks. She is actually afraid of not being able to fly the ship properly.

After starting the main engine, Sumire activates the bar in "3-dimensional mode" allowing her to visualize all the ships around the Wunder. When the ship is attacked by the Nemesis Series, Sumire is in charge of defense maneuvers under Misato's direction. It's a success and the enemies are destroyed.

Her role is much less prominent in the rest of the film, especially during the Fourth Impact.

Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time

Trivia

is the name of a light cruiser of the Japanese Imperial Navy between 1920 and 1923.
Sumire is also the name of a Tachibana class destroyer built between 1943 and 1945.
